items.name: Yongjun Jakarta Speedcubing 2019

venue.name: [Green Pramuka Square](http://www.greenpramukasquare.com/)
venue.address: Jl. Rw. Jaya No.49, RT.16/RW.9, Rawasari, Kec. Cemp. Putih, Kota Jakarta Pusat, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta 13120

items.information: An official World Cube Association competition initiated by the [Nusantara Speedcubing Association](http://www.nsa.or.id/) and Jakarta Speedcubing Community in collaboration with [Green Pramuka Square](https://www.instagram.com/greenpramukasquarejakarta/) and [YJ](https://www.facebook.com/Yongjuncube/) to accommodate people who love the cube.
